title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Select Trust - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Select Trust - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Select Trust, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!
